page_content:
SPAN399 Independent Study in Spanish (1-3 Credits) Speciﬁc readings in literature or a translation project under the supervision of a faculty member of the department. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department. Repeatable to: 3 credits.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY

SPAN401 Advanced Composition I (3 Credits) Compositions and essays with emphasis on stylistics, idiomatic and syntactic structures. Organization and writing of research papers. Prerequisite: SPAN302; or permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.

SPAN402 Advanced Composition II (3 Credits) Compositions and essays with emphasis on stylistics, idiomatic and syntactic structures. Organization and writing of research papers. Prerequisite: SPAN401; or permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.
